entity.label: Naaran
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Boyish, juvenile, a town in Ephraim between Bethel and Jericho (1 Chr. 7:28).

nodes.label: Naaran
nodes.description: Boyish, juvenile, a town in Ephraim between Bethel and Jericho (1 Chr. 7:28).

verses.text: And their possessions and habitations were, Bethel and the towns thereof, and eastward Naaran, and westward Gezer, with the towns thereof; Shechem also and the towns thereof, unto Gaza and the towns thereof:
